name: Build with Gemma — AIMS DTU Hackathon
description: The next generation of open models is here! Welcome to Build with Gemma — AIMS DTU, a fast-paced, 1-day in-person hackathon where you'll get hands-on with the most capable open models from Google DeepMind. Organised by AIMS DTU in collaboration with Google, this event challenges participants to build innovative AI-powered projects using the Gemma model family.
venue: Delhi Technological University, Rohini, New Delhi
registrationProcess: Visit the official website at buildwithgemma.aimsdtu.in and fill out the registration form before the deadline. Registration is free and open to all DTU students.
